entry.string: Installing Airflow DAGs from src/.airflow-dags/ to .ops/.airflow/dags/...
# Run install-dags.sh script if [ -f "./install-dags.sh" ]; then chmod +x ./install-dags.sh ./install-dags.sh else echo "⚠️ install-dags.sh not found. Skipping DAG installation." fi

error.detailMessage: No test report files were found. Configuration error?

entry.string: Warning: Could not archive JUnit test results: No test report files were found. Configuration error?
HTML test report not found, skipping HTML publishing
Check Registry and Build Docker Image

wf.a.LabelAction.displayName: Check Registry and Build Docker Image

entry.string: Make Image Available to Kind Cluster

wf.a.LabelAction.displayName: Make Image Available to Kind Cluster

entry.string: # Clean up old incremental images, but preserve base images docker images hmm-model-training-dev --format '{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}' | \ grep -v ':base$' | \ sed 's/.*://' | \ grep -E '^dev-[0-9]+-' | \ sort -t- -k2 -nr | \ tail -n +11 | \ xargs -r -I {} docker rmi hmm-model-training-dev:{} || true
